title: The Annoying Villagers Server Pack
description: A resource pack containing weapons, armor, and items from MrFudgeMonkeyz' Youtube series, Annoying Villagers
body:
This is a 2 year project of creating the Annoying Villagers Resource Pack/Server with consistent updates. The resource pack was originally stolen credit of and was uploaded to this site. We originally made the pack to be only exclusive to the AV (Annoying Villagers) server, but the pack kept on getting ripped from server and people claimed it as theirs. We like to thank UnityPusheen and MrLech for recreating in the AV weapon textures in the first place and we now have other users who is contributing at making the pack, mainly Maximino and the others listed below:
 
FEATURES
- New Items
- Animated Items
- 3D Vanilla Tools
OPTIFINE FEATURES
- Armor-Breaking Textures (Based on Durability)
- Custom Armor
- Glowing Textures
Note: To view our new items ingame, you need to use CustomModelData.

You can use our textures on your mods or servers, all we ask is that you properly credit us.
 
 
CREDITS
MrFudgeMonkeyz: Creator of Annoying Villagers
Ultimabrines: Founder of the Annoying Villagers Minecraft Server
UnityPusheen: Majority of the Weapon Textures
MrLech: Majority of Textures, Models, Sounds
Maximino: Majority of Textures, Models
CONTRIBUTORS
TheArix: Textures
Hivane: Textures
Endmonsitone442: Textures
TaupeDude: Sounds, Textures
Blue_Hair030: Models
tiny_Shawn315: Models
 
The official Minecraft Annoying villagers Server is currently on Beta and you can join it by joining our discord server for more information.
 
Our Discord Server

https://discord.gg/7z6k9VJmZ
